'''Damualer Triac''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="DHP" /> located in the [[Damualer Triac system/Legends|Damualer Triac system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> The [[Millennium Oak]] grew on the world. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Haaran Balmor]] retired to Damualer Triac with his second wife, [[Hannah Balmor]]. Haaran and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Hart Daele]], who was seven [[Parsec/Legends|kiloparsecs]] away in the [[Samarine Province]], played several games of [[Divoran holochess|Divoran Holochess]] over a forty-[[Standard year/Legends|year]] period via [[Projective Telepathy]].<ref name="DHP" />

==Appearances==
